data.title: Distributed Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes a global network of data centers to ensure reliable and fast access.
data.technical_spec: An intricate system of data centers across continents, utilizing load balancing and edge computing.

data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Breaks down services into smaller, independently deployable units.
data.technical_spec: Multiple microservices manage specific functions with REST APIs and container orchestration.

data.title: Search Indexing
data.description: Employs complex algorithms to index and retrieve information efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Uses advanced data structures and query optimization techniques.

data.title: Latency Optimization
data.description: Minimizes the time taken to load and interact with the site.
data.technical_spec: Employs techniques like caching, lazy loading, and CDNs.

data.title: Redundancy and Failover
data.technical_spec: Multiple redundant paths and auto-failover capabilities.
